seo.title: Catering — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
seo.description: Off-site catering for corporate events, weddings, and private parties. Authentic Cantonese cuisine delivered.

hero.heading: Catering Services
hero.subheading: Authentic Cantonese cuisine brought to your event

description: Grand Pavilion's catering team brings the same quality and authenticity of our restaurant kitchen to your off-site event. We serve the greater New York City area with a minimum 72-hour advance notice.
descriptionZh: 大观楼外卖团队将餐厅同等品质的正宗粤菜带到您的场外活动。我们服务纽约市及周边地区，需提前至少72小时预订。

services.name: Private Parties
services.description: Birthdays, anniversaries, family gatherings. Minimum 30 guests.

services.name: Wedding Receptions
services.description: Full wedding banquet service. Minimum 50 guests.
